overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a cowboy hat exploring a desert canyon landscape. The character walks along a cliffside trail, climbs onto a rock outcrop to survey the river and canyon below, then continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail approaching cliff edge

events.description: character begins climbing onto the rock outcrop at the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the cliff edge overlooking the canyon river

entered.detail: sandy dirt path winding along the canyon edge
wide greenish river flowing through the canyon below
tall layered red rock formations forming the canyon walls
sparse dry bushes and yucca plants dotting the landscape
large sandstone boulder at the cliff edge providing an overlook

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dusty trail in a desert canyon environment. The path leads toward a cliff edge overlooking a wide green river below, with red rock formations rising in the distance. Sparse desert vegetation dots the sandy ground as the character approaches a large rock outcrop.

events.description: character reaches the top of the rock outcrop revealing panoramic canyon views
camera begins panning slowly to showcase the 360-degree landscape views

agents.ego_description: standing on the rock outcrop and slowly panning the camera to survey the canyon, river, and distant mountains

entered.detail: hazy mountain ranges visible on the horizon beyond the canyon
small structures or buildings visible on the far canyon rim

segments.scene_description: Standing atop the rock outcrop, the character surveys the vast canyon landscape. The camera pans across the green river winding through the gorge, revealing distant mountains and a small settlement on the far rim. The perspective shifts 360 degrees to show the full scope of the desert canyon environment from this elevated vantage point.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail along canyon wall

events.description: character steps off the rock outcrop and resumes walking along the cliffside trail

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow cliffside trail with the canyon wall on the right and the river drop-off on the left

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall rising immediately beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the overlook and continues along a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside. The path hugs the canyon wall on the right while the river flows below on the left. The character navigates the uneven terrain, passing desert scrub and rocky outcroppings as the trail winds along the canyon edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dusty canyon trail to an expansive elevated vista before returning to a narrow cliffside path. It begins with the character walking along a sandy trail dotted with sparse vegetation, moving steadily toward a large rock outcrop overlooking a wide green river and distant red rock formations. As the character reaches the summit, the camera pans in a full 360-degree rotation to reveal the vast scope of the gorge, winding river, and a small settlement perched on the far rim. The perspective then shifts as the character descends from the overlook, returning to a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside. Finally, the camera follows the character as they navigate the uneven terrain, hugging the canyon wall while the river continues to flow below.
